title: Yale University: AI Policy Crawl Report
summary: Yale University has official AI guidance spanning provost-level data and academic-integrity expectations, Poorvu Center teaching and learning guidance, approved AI tools and data classification information, privacy/FERPA guidance, and academic dishonesty references. The approved staged claims are limited to official Yale pages and are marked agent_reviewed only.
limitations: This tracker is not legal advice, not academic integrity advice, and not an official university statement unless a linked source is the university's own official page.
sourceRightsPolicy: Tracker metadata is open licensed. Official source documents, page text, PDFs, and other source materials retain their original rights and terms.
